bird.name: Carriker's mountain tanager
bird.summary: Carriker's mountain-tanager (Dubusia carrikeri) is a species of Neotropical bird in the tanager family Thraupidae. Carriker's mountain-tana…

relations.subject: Carriker's mountain tanager
relations.evidence: Wood | year = 2022 | title = The eBird/Clements checklist of Birds of the World: v2022| url = https://www.birds.cornell.edu/clementschecklist/download/}} As of today, its population is in decline due to habitat damage by recreation, pollution, and climate change
